title: dens-leonis
intro: Dens-leonis, also known as lion's tooth or leopard's bane, is a flowering plant species within the genus Leonurus, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of dens-leonis are attributed to its essential oils, which contain compounds such as borneol, bornyl acetate, and borneol acetate, known for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of dens-leonis include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Dens-leonis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for medicinal purposes.
